title="fix(manifests): correct style/font-pairing/stack counts (#289) (#391)

The marketplace-facing manifests understated the catalog. Actual data:
84 styles (styles.csv), 73 font pairings (typography.csv), and 17 stacks
(data/stacks/*.csv), but plugin.json, marketplace.json, and skill.json
all claimed 67 styles / 57 font pairings / 15 stacks.

title="Rename motion domain to gsap to avoid collision with PR #296

PR #296 (feat/emil-motion-principles) independently registers a "motion"
domain key in CSV_CONFIG/detect_domain for motion-principles.csv (37
design-principle rows). Both PRs adding the same dict key would cause
one to silently overwrite the other's domain registration if merged
independently, per the automated review on this PR.

The two domains are complementary, not duplicate (design principles vs.
ready-to-use GSAP code snippets), so this renames this PR's domain from
"motion" to "gsap" - a more precise name given every row is GSAP-specific
implementation code. The --motion CLI dial and its "Subtle/Standard/
Complex" tiers are unaffected (unrelated to the domain key; only the
`--domain gsap` search endpoint and its internal lookup changed). No
regressions: --design-system output with no dials set remains
byte-identical to before this feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>" class="Link--secondary" href="/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/commit/6a6167691a88167cd9f4642259be0f579954d907">Rename motion domain to <p dir="auto">Each rule includes:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Recommended Pattern</strong> - Landing page structure</li>
<li><strong>Style Priority</strong> - Best matching UI styles</li>
<li><strong>Color Mood</strong> - Industry-appropriate palettes</li>
<li><strong>Typography Mood</strong> - Font personality matching</li>
<li><strong>Key Effects</strong> - Animations and interactions</li>
<li><strong>Anti-Patterns</strong> - What NOT to do (e.g., "AI purple/pink gradients" for banking)</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">💎 Basic vs. Premium Version Comparison</h2><a id="user-content--basic-vs-premium-version-comparison" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 💎 Basic vs. Premium Version Comparison" href="#-basic-vs-premium-version-comparison"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Many users ask about the differences between the open-source and premium versions. Here is a detailed breakdown to help you choose the right fit for your workflow.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🟢 Basic Version (This Repository)</h3><a id="user-content--basic-version-this-repository" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🟢 Basic Version (This Repository)" href="#-basic-version-this-repository"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Fully Open Source:</strong> Perfect for individual developers, hobbyists, and standard projects.</li>
<li><strong>Core UI/UX Intelligence:</strong> Full access to 67 UI styles, 161 product types, color palettes, and curated font pairings.</li>
<li><strong>Smart Recommendations:</strong> Built-in BM25 search engine for highly accurate design matching.</li>
<li><strong>Cross-Platform Support:</strong> Stack-specific guidelines supporting 13+ major frameworks (React, Vue, Tailwind, iOS, Android, etc.).</li>
<li><strong>Design System Generation:</strong> Instantly generate tailored UI rules, patterns, and logic via CLI.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🟡 Premium Version</h3><a id="user-content--premium-version" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🟡 Premium Version" href="#-premium-version"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Extended Brand Design Skills:</strong> Goes beyond UI/UX to include Brand Identity generation, Logo Design, Corporate Identity Programs (CIP), Banners, Presentation Slides, and custom Iconography.</li>
<li><strong>Advanced Asset Creation:</strong> Deep integration with AI-powered image generation to create real visual assets, not just placeholders.</li>
<li><strong>Enterprise Architecture:</strong> A more comprehensive and scalable Design Token architecture, built for large-scale team deployments.</li>
<li><strong>Priority Support:</strong> Dedicated technical assistance for teams and professionals who need an uninterrupted full design workflow.</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">👉 <em>For more details on upgrading to the Premium tier, visit <a href="https://uupm.cc" rel="nofollow">uupm.cc</a>.</em></p>

<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>uipro versions              <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> List available versions</span>
uipro update                <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Refresh skill files from installed CLI package</span>
uipro init --offline        <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Compatibility flag; installs bundled templates</span>
uipro uninstall             <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Remove skill (auto-detect platform)</span>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">How It Works</h3><a id="user-content-how-it-works" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: How It Works" href="#how-it-works"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>You ask</strong> - Request any UI/UX task (build, design, create, implement, review, fix, improve)</li>
<li><strong>Design System Generated</strong> - The AI automatically generates a complete design system using the reasoning engine</li>
<li><strong>Smart recommendations</strong> - Based on your product type and requirements, it finds the best matching styles, colors, and typography</li>
<li><strong>Code generation</strong> - Implements the UI with proper colors, fonts, spacing, and best practices</li>
<li><strong>Pre-delivery checks</strong> - Validates against common UI/UX anti-patterns</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Supported Stacks</h3><a id="user-content-supported-stacks" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Supported Stacks" href="#supported-stacks"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">Just mention your preferred stack in the prompt, or let it default to HTML + Tailwind.</p>

<p dir="auto">Save your design system to files for <strong>hierarchical retrieval across sessions</strong>:</p>

<p dir="auto"><strong>How hierarchical retrieval works:</strong></p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>When building a specific page (e.g., "Checkout"), first check <code>design-system/pages/checkout.md</code></li>
<li>If the page file exists, its rules <strong>override</strong> the Master file</li>
<li>If not, use <code>design-system/MASTER.md</code> exclusively</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Context-aware retrieval prompt:</strong></p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto"><pre class="notranslate"><code>I am building the [Page Name] page. Please read design-system/MASTER.md.
Also check if design-system/pages/[page-name].md exists.
If the page file exists, prioritize its rules.
If not, use the Master rules exclusively.
Now, generate the code...
</code></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Architecture & Contributing</h2><a id="user-content-architecture--contributing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Architecture & Contributing" href="#architecture--contributing"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">For Users</h3><a id="user-content-for-users" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: For Users" href="#for-users"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The codebase has been restructured to use a <strong>template-based generation system</strong>. All platform-specific files (<code>.cursor/</code>, <code>.windsurf/</code>, <code>.kiro/</code>, <code>.factory/</code>, etc.) are now generated dynamically by the CLI.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Always use the CLI to install:</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>npm install -g ui-ux-pro-max-cli
uipro init --ai <span class="pl-k"><</span>platform<span class="pl-k">></span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

uipro init --ai <platform>" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">This ensures you get the latest templates bundled with the installed CLI package and the correct file structure for your AI assistant. Update the npm package first when a new release is published.</p>

<p dir="auto">If you want to contribute to this project:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 1. Clone the repository</span>

cli/                         <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> CLI installer (generates files from templates)</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 3. Make changes in src/ui-ux-pro-max/</span>
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> - data/*.csv              → Database files</span>
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> - scripts/*.py            → Search engine & design system</span>
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> - templates/              → Platform-specific templates</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 4. Sync to CLI and test locally</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 5. Build and test CLI</span>

node dist/index.js init --ai claude --offline  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Test in a temp folder</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 6. Create PR (never push directly to main)</span>

git commit -m <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>feat: description<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
git push -u origin feat/your-feature

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Automated Releases</h2><a id="user-content-automated-releases" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Automated Releases" href="#automated-releases"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This repository uses semantic-release with Conventional Commits to create GitHub releases automatically:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>dev</code> branch creates beta GitHub prereleases such as <code>2.6.0-beta.1</code>.</li>
<li><code>main</code> branch creates official stable GitHub releases such as <code>2.6.0</code>.</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Release notes and <code>CHANGELOG.md</code> are generated from Conventional Commit messages. Version numbers are synchronized across <code>skill.json</code>, <code>.claude-plugin/plugin.json</code>, <code>.claude-plugin/marketplace.json</code>, <code>cli/package.json</code>, and <code>cli/package-lock.json</code> during release preparation.</p>
<p dir="auto">Use these commit types for correct version bumps:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>fix:</code> -> patch release</li>
<li><code>feat:</code> -> minor release</li>
<li><code>feat!:</code> or <code>BREAKING CHANGE:</code> -> major release</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">The release workflow uses the default <code>GITHUB_TOKEN</code> for GitHub releases and the repository <code>NPM_TOKEN</code> secret to publish <code>ui-ux-pro-max-cli</code> to npm.</p>

<p dir="auto">The skill was installed in a different directory than where you're running the command. Either:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Option A — run from the project root where you originally installed it</span>
<span class="pl-c1">cd</span> /path/to/your/project
uipro uninstall

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Option B — remove the global install</span>
uipro uninstall --global

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Option C — remove manually</span>
rm -rf .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max   <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Claude Code</span>
rm -rf .cursor/skills/ui-ux-pro-max   <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Cursor</span>
rm -rf .windsurf/skills/ui-ux-pro-max <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Windsurf</span>
rm -rf .agents/skills/ui-ux-pro-max   <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Antigravity</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Claude Marketplace install fails with "Zip file contains a symbolic link"</h3><a id="user-content-claude-marketplace-install-fails-with-zip-file-contains-a-symbolic-link" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Claude Marketplace install fails with "Zip file contains a symbolic link"" href="#claude-marketplace-install-fails-with-zip-file-contains-a-symbolic-link"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This is a known issue with versions prior to v2.5.1. The repository used symlinks internally which some installation tools can't handle. <strong>Fix:</strong> use the CLI installer instead:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>npm install -g ui-ux-pro-max-cli
uipro init --ai claude</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
